steps.title: Identify the goal's requirement
steps.content: The student wants to identify the sculpture for which Arp won the prize. To accomplish this goal, the response must name the specific sculpture from the notes: Sculpture classique.

steps.title: Select the choice that accomplishes the goal
steps.content: C accomplishes the goal by naming the sculpture (Sculpture classique) and connecting it to Arp's Carnegie Prize win. A, B, and D either mention Arp and the prize without naming the sculpture, or discuss irrelevant prize details. That matches choice C — C is correct.
